globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://mediaportal.scania.com data:; connect-src 'self'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), interest-cohort=()
